data.title: pump.fun deposited 65,122 SOL to Kraken 3 hours ago, and deposited more than $247 million in SOL this year
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to Onchain Lens monitoring, 3 hours ago, pump.fun deposited 65,122 SOLs worth $10.97 million to Kraken.
In 2025, it sent a total of 1,235,043 SOLs worth $247.52 million.
Overall, pump.fun has earned 2,930,093 SOLs, currently worth $495.36 million.

data.title: SEC Reviews 21Shares' Spot ETH ETF Staking Application
data.description: According to BlockBeats, on February 20, the United States Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) has accepted the application from 21Shares for its spot Ethereum (ETH) exchange-traded fund (ETF) staking proposal.

data.title: USDC Treasury issued approximately 53.7 million USDC on the Ethereum chain early this morning
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Whale Alert monitoring, at 1:06 Beijing time, USDC Treasury issued 53,694,999 USDC on the Ethereum chain.

data.title: Trump: Tariffs on cars, semiconductors, chips, pharmaceuticals and possibly lumber will be announced within a month or sooner
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: US President Trump said that he will announce tariffs on automobiles, semiconductors, chips, pharmaceuticals and possibly timber in the next month or earlier. (Jinshi)

data.title: Coinbase Prime now supports Bittensor (TAO) custody
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, Coinbase Prime now supports Bittensor (TAO) custody. The availability of this asset may be restricted by the custody entity and customer jurisdiction.

data.title: U.S. President Trump Plans Tariffs On Key Industries
data.description: According to Odaily, U.S. President Donald Trump has announced plans to impose tariffs on several industries, including automotive, semiconductors, chips, pharmaceuticals, and potentially lumber. The announcement is expected to be made within the next month or sooner.

data.title: WLFI spent about $250,000 USDC to buy nearly 1.1 million SEI
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News On-chain data shows that the Trump family's encryption project WLFI spent about $250,000 USDC to buy nearly 1.1 million SEIs a few minutes ago.

data.title: Trump Signs Executive Order To Boost AI And End Crypto Restrictions
data.description: According to BlockBeats, U.S. President Donald Trump announced on February 20 that he has signed an executive order aimed at positioning the United States as a leader in the field of artificial intelligence. Additionally, the order seeks to end the previous administration's restrictive policies on Bitcoin and cryptocurrencies, signaling the beginning of a new era for digital assets.

data.title: Solana's Price Predicted To Reach $520 By End Of 2025
data.description: According to Odaily, despite recent bearish trends, funds and industry key opinion leaders (KOLs) predict that Solana's price could reach $520 or higher by the end of 2025.

data.title: Trump: We want to be at the forefront of everything, cryptocurrency is one of them
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Trump said at the Miami Future Investment Initiative Institute conference on Wednesday: "Bitcoin has set multiple historical highs because everyone knows that I am committed to making the United States the capital of cryptocurrency." He added: "We want to be at the forefront of everything, one of which is cryptocurrency, and Miami seems to be the center of the action. If you think about it, maybe it will always be there." Washington is expected to have the most cryptocurrency-supportive Congress to date, and pro-cryptocurrency lawmakers such as Senate Banking Committee Chairman Tim Scott and House Financial Services Committee Chairman French Hill are leading key committees to lead crypto regulation. (The Block)
